name: Invoke-CompromisedAccountResponse
description: Run the 13-step compromised-account playbook against a UPN. Snapshots state, contains (block / revoke / rotate), audits 24h activity + 7d sent mail + 7d outbound shares, optionally quarantines sent mail, notifies security team, generates an HTML report. Highest-blast-radius operation in the tool. ALWAYS requires explicit per-step operator approval; plan-level [A]pprove-all is forcibly disabled when this tool appears in a plan.

Severity.description: Low=forensic only; Medium=contain; High=default; Critical=add quarantine prompt.

Reason.description: Free-text reason recorded with the incident registry record.

QuarantineSentMail.description: Enable step 11 (purge 7d sent items). Always requires the operator to type PURGE to confirm even in non-interactive mode.

name: Get-IncidentTimeline
description: Read-only. Returns a chronological list of audit entries tied to one incident id. Useful when the operator asks 'walk me through what happened in INC-XXXX'. No state changes.

name: Get-IncidentList
description: Read-only. List incidents in the current tenant, filtered by status / days / severity. Returns the same shape as Get-Incidents.

Days.description: Only incidents started within N days

name: Summarize-AuditEvents
description: Generate a human-readable narrative ('In the last 24h this account signed in from Lagos and Sao Paulo within 6 minutes of each other, downloaded 187 files, and sent 23 emails to external recipients containing the phrase "wire transfer urgent"') from a list of audit / sign-in events captured during an incident. Sends events through the existing privacy-redaction pass before calling the configured AI provider. Gated by config: IncidentResponse.UseAIForNarrative must be 'Enabled' or this returns ai_narrative_disabled -- off by default so sensitive forensic data is not sent to an external LLM unless the operator explicitly opted in.

MaxRows.description: Cap events sent to the model (default 100)
